description: Extract all text from the source PDF and organize it by chapters into a structured format ready for translation. Create a Python script that extracts text from each page, identifies chapter boundaries, and saves the organized text into separate chapter files.
steps: Create a Python script at /projects/sandbox/gg/extract_chapters.py that reads the source PDF using pdfplumber
Parse the extracted text to identify chapter boundaries based on 'Chapter N.' pattern and other structural elements (Preface, Authors' biographies, Afterword, Contents)

Save each chapter's text into /projects/sandbox/gg/chapters_en/ directory as separate .txt files (e.g., chapter_00_preface.txt, chapter_01_why_chess.txt, ... chapter_26_stalemate_and_draw.txt, chapter_27_afterword.txt)
Run the script and verify all chapters are correctly separated

The book structure based on TOC: Preface (p9), Authors' bios (p10), Ch1-Why Chess (p11), Ch2-What You Should Expect (p19), Ch3-Tips on Teaching (p23), Ch4-Special Exercises 2-4 Year Olds (p35), Ch5-The Rook (p49), Ch6-How to Take Pieces (p61), Ch7-The Bishop (p71), Ch8-Attack and Defend (p79), Ch9-The Queen (p97), Ch10-The King (p109), Ch11-Check (p113), Ch12-Checkmate (p125), Ch13-The Knight (p133), Ch14-The Pawn (p143), Ch15-Legal and Illegal Moves (p165), Ch16-Set Up Chessboard (p169), Ch17-The First Game (p177), Ch18-Castling (p183), Ch19-Tips for Starting a Game (p199), Ch20-Value of Pieces (p217), Ch21-Pieces Can Get in Way (p225), Ch22-More About Attacking (p233), Ch23-More About Defending (p241), Ch24-Getting Out of Check (p257), Ch25-More About Checkmate (p269), Ch26-Stalemate and Draw (p291), Afterword (p302)
acceptance_criteria: All 26 chapters plus preface, bios, and afterword are extracted into separate text files
Chapter files contain clean readable text
No chapter content is lost or duplicated between files
verification: Run extract_chapters.py and confirm it creates all expected files in chapters_en/
Verify total character count across all chapter files is close to the 272,245 characters in extracted_text.txt
